Who It's For
Built for Both Sides

Whether you're a skilled worker or a business needing talent — Work2Wish connects you instantly.

👷 For Employees

Earn More in Your Free Time

Find verified nearby jobs that match your skills — without quitting your main job.

  • ✓Verified companies with ratings & reviews
  • ✓AI matches jobs to your skill & location
  • ✓Real-time work tracking & easy payments
  • ✓Request jobs in advance for better planning
  • ✓Earn extra without changing your main job
🏢 For Employers

Find Skilled Workers Fast

Access verified, rated candidates instantly and manage every job end-to-end.

  • ✓Post budgets & skill requirements clearly
  • ✓AI matching by proximity and expertise
  • ✓Work log for real-time project transparency
  • ✓Seamless payment on job completion
  • ✓Build a trusted local workforce over time

Home › How It Works

How Work2Wish Works

See the vision behind Work2Wish and understand the complete journey for workers and employers.

Employee Journey

How It Works for Employees

Create a trusted profile, discover suitable nearby opportunities, complete the work, and receive payment.

01
👤

Create & Verify Profile

Add your skills, experience, availability, location, and verification details.

02
📍

Find Nearby Jobs

Browse suitable opportunities matched to your skills and preferred working area.

03
🤝

Apply & Start Work

Apply for the job, confirm the schedule, and begin once the employer hires you.

04
💰

Complete & Get Paid

Finish the assigned work, receive payment, and build your profile through reviews.

Employer Journey

How It Works for Employers

Post clear requirements, connect with verified local workers, monitor progress, and complete payment.

01
🏢

Create Company Profile

Add company information, location, contact details, and verification documents.

02
📋

Post Your Job

Define the required skill, work schedule, job location, duration, and budget.

03
🔍

Choose the Right Worker

Review matched applicants, compare verified profiles, and hire the best fit.

04
✅

Track, Pay & Review

Monitor the work, approve completion, make payment, and provide feedback.

Unified Journey
The Complete Work2Wish Flow
01
📋

Post a Job

Employers outline skill requirements, contract specs, location, and budget for workers to see.

02
🤖

Smart Matching

Our algorithm matches workers by proximity and skill — ensuring the perfect fit every time.

03
🤝

Confirm & Schedule

Workers request the job in advance. Both sides confirm before any work begins.

04
📊

Track Progress

The Work Log lets employers monitor project progress in real time — full transparency throughout.

05
✅

Complete the Job

Workers deliver quality output and mark the job done. Employers review and approve.

06
💰

Pay & Review

Employers pay through the platform. Both parties leave ratings for a trusted community.

Simple. Trusted. Connected.

Every step is designed to keep work clear and transparent.

From profile creation to payment and feedback, both sides stay connected throughout the journey.

About Work2Wish
Connecting Skills with Opportunity

Welcome to Work2Wish.com! We are a digital platform dedicated to making blue-collar freelancing easy and accessible. Our mission is to connect skilled individuals with local job opportunities without requiring them to leave their 9-to-5 jobs.

Founder's Message
The Vision Behind
Work2Wish

PRAMOD SHETTY

Founder, Work2Wish.com

“Beauty of skill is realised when it is at right use”

Work2Wish.com was founded by Pramod Shetty to bridge the gap between skilled local talent and nearby opportunities.

3+
Years in Industry
150+
Active Workers
50+
Employers
🎯

Mission

Our mission is to empower individuals by providing a reliable and user-friendly platform that connects their skills to nearby opportunities. We strive to build a digital marketplace that fuels economic growth, encourages professional development, and enhances the well-being of individuals. By offering a comprehensive solution, we aim to create an ecosystem where individuals can seamlessly integrate freelancing into their lives, unlocking their full potential.

👁️

Vision

Our vision at Work2Wish.com is to enrich people's lives by empowering them with endless earning possibilities and the freedom to manage their time. We aspire to create a world where individuals can pursue their dreams, utilize their skills, and create a livelihood that brings them satisfaction and joy. We envision a future where the boundaries between traditional employment and freelancing blur, allowing individuals to thrive both professionally and personally.

Work2Wish Community

About Work2Wish

Connecting Skilled People with the Right Opportunities

Welcome to Work2Wish.com! We are a digital platform dedicated to making blue-collar freelancing easy and accessible. Our mission is to connect skilled individuals with local job opportunities without requiring them to leave their 9-to-5 jobs. Our goal is to empower people by providing endless earning possibilities and freedom of time, enabling them to enhance their lives while maintaining their professional commitments.

At Work2Wish.com, we understand the challenges faced by individuals seeking flexible work options and the desire to spend more time with their families. We have developed a platform that addresses these needs, bridging the gap between skills and local job opportunities. Our platform facilitates connections between skilled workers and businesses or individuals in need of their services, all within their proximity.

We believe that everyone should have the opportunity to explore their passions, develop their skills, and earn an income that aligns with their goals and lifestyle. By connecting skilled professionals with nearby job opportunities, Work2Wish.com provides individuals with the means to achieve financial independence and balance their work-life priorities effectively.

Founder

Founder's Message

Pramod Shetty · Founder, Work2Wish.com

“Beauty of skill is realised when it is at right use” — Pramod Shetty

Work2Wish.com was founded by Pramod Shetty, a dedicated individual who understands the challenges faced by blue-collar workers seeking opportunities in their local areas. After leaving a successful corporate career, Pramod chose to dedicate his time to his family and became involved in the family business. During this journey, he witnessed firsthand the plight of talented individuals who were unaware of the opportunities available to them in their vicinity.

Motivated by his personal experiences as a freelancer and his deep-rooted belief in the power of local talent, Pramod embarked on a mission to bridge the gap between skills and opportunities. Work2Wish.com became his brainchild, driven by a passion for empowering individuals and connecting them with nearby job opportunities.

Pramod's personal journey and understanding of the challenges faced by both skilled professionals and businesses have shaped the foundation of Work2Wish.com. His dedication to supporting the freelancing community and commitment to creating a platform that maximizes earning potential while ensuring a healthy work-life balance is the driving force behind the success and growth of Work2Wish.com.

Join us at Work2Wish.com and embark on a journey of endless possibilities. Together, let's build a community that nurtures local talent, fosters economic empowerment, and transforms lives for the better.

Home › FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Work2Wish, answered clearly and concisely.

What is Work2Wish?+

Work2Wish is India's blue-collar freelancing platform that connects skilled workers with local employers. It allows workers to earn extra income without leaving their current job, while helping employers find verified, skilled talent quickly.

Is Work2Wish free to join?+

Yes! Creating an account on Work2Wish is completely free for both employees and employers. We only charge a small platform fee on successful job completions.

Which cities does Work2Wish operate in?+

We currently operate primarily in Bengaluru with a strong presence in the Peenya Industrial Area. We are actively expanding to other major Indian cities.

How do I find jobs on Work2Wish?+

After creating your profile, our smart algorithm automatically matches you with relevant jobs near your location based on your skills and availability. You'll receive notifications and can also browse available postings.

Can I work on Work2Wish while keeping my full-time job?+

Absolutely — that's exactly what Work2Wish is designed for! You can take up jobs during weekends, holidays, or after your regular work hours. The platform lets you request jobs in advance so you can plan around your existing schedule.

How are workers verified on the platform?+

Workers go through an identity verification process during registration. Additionally, our rating and review system ensures that workers with a strong track record are highlighted to employers.

How do I post a job on Work2Wish?+

After creating your employer account, you can post a job by specifying the skill requirements, job duration, location, and budget. Our platform will then match you with suitable verified workers in your area.

How quickly can I find a worker?+

Most employers receive qualified candidate matches within a few hours of posting a job. For urgent requirements, our platform prioritizes your listing to ensure the fastest possible turnaround.

What is the Work Log feature?+

The Work Log is a real-time project tracking feature that allows employers to monitor the progress of an ongoing job. Workers update their progress and employers can review it anytime — ensuring full transparency.

How does payment work?+

Payments are processed securely through the Work2Wish platform upon job completion and employer approval. Workers receive payment directly to their registered bank account or UPI.

What payment methods are supported?+

We support UPI, Net Banking, and major debit/credit cards for employer payments. Worker payouts are made via UPI or direct bank transfer (NEFT/IMPS).

Clear Answers

Everything you need to move forward with confidence.

Work2Wish keeps the experience simple for employees, employers, and growing businesses.
